wfmu playlists & archives
DJ Playlists, Audio Archives
and Station Playlist Reports


Other Related Links:

  • WFMU's Live Streams
  • Audio Archives of Live Music and Interviews
  • WFMU's Most Recent Archives Page
  • Random Archive Generator
  • RSS feeds: MP3 | Playlists feed

    Not all DJs provide playlists; if not, you can usually call them during their shift (at 201-200-9368) to ask about previous shows, or you can look up DJ email addresses.

    If you're looking for JM in the AM archives, click here.


    Station Playlists - Provided by Music Director Jessica Romoff
    • WFMU Heavily played recordings 
    • Favorites from WFMU's New and Old Record Bins
